Company: Synthetic Data Centre GmbH
Location: Frankfurt am Main, Germany
Exact workplace: Synthetic Campus, Teststraße 1, 60311 Frankfurt
Employment: Full-time
Contract type: Permanent
Salary: €2.000,00 net per month
Languages: German B2 or English B2 accepted
Education: Secondary education accepted
Experience: Entry level; no professional experience required
Skills: PC hardware, structured cabling, hardware troubleshooting, server installation
Certifications: None required
Shift: Day shift only
On-call: No on-call work
Car: No own car required
Physical: No continuous heavy work required; light or normal physical work only
Training: Role-specific onboarding provided

Deadline: 2099-12-31

Description:
This synthetic vacancy covers day-shift hardware checks, structured cabling, and troubleshooting. It has no night work, requires no own car, and involves only light or normal physical work. English B2 is accepted. All names, contact details, claims, and role details are synthetic test facts and must never be submitted.
